mapper.insert: INSERT INTO service_comment (appointment_id, service_id, user_id, user_name, rating, content, images) VALUES (#{appointmentId}, #{serviceId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{images})
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.avatar as user_avatar, s.name as service_name FROM service_comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN service_item s ON c.service_id = s.id WHERE c.service_id = #{serviceId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM service_comment WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE service_comment SET reply = #{reply}, reply_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE service_comment SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as star5, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as star4, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as star3, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as star2, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as star1 FROM service_comment WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND status = 1
